Issue Description: Broken legacy commercial/local URL '/houston-tpo-roofer' returns 404 Not Found.
Recommended Fix: 301 redirect the broken URL to the closest relevant live commercial TPO Houston page, or restore the page if it has historical value or backlinks.

Issue Description: '/tpo-roof/houston/' returns 301 and should be mapped to the most relevant service-specific destination.
Recommended Fix: Confirm final destination preserves commercial TPO intent and update redirect mapping if it currently resolves too broadly.

Issue Description: 12 redirects were found across a relatively small crawl set, indicating legacy URL dependency.
Recommended Fix: Audit all 3xx URLs, reduce unnecessary redirect reliance, and update internal links to point directly to final 200 URLs.

Issue Description: 10 page titles exceed recommended display length best practices.
Recommended Fix: Rewrite priority title tags for cleaner SERP display, stronger local targeting, and better click-through potential.

Issue Description: 2 page titles are too short and appear under-optimized.
Recommended Fix: Expand short titles with service plus location intent where appropriate.

Issue Description: 11 meta descriptions exceed recommended character length and may truncate in SERPs.
Recommended Fix: Rewrite descriptions to improve clarity, CTR, and local value proposition.
Add one clear H1 per page aligned to page purpose, service intent, or location target.
Standardize heading hierarchy so H2/H3 usage reflects logical content structure.

Issue Description: At least one page is canonicalised and non-indexable, requiring validation of the intended ranking URL.
Recommended Fix: Validate canonical targets and ensure the correct page is indexable and eligible to rank.

Issue Description: Internal link context appears weak, with limited descriptive anchor support to money pages.
Recommended Fix: Add contextual internal links from hub, service, and location pages using descriptive anchor text.

Issue Description: Broad Houston page intent may overlap with narrower residential and commercial Houston pages.
Recommended Fix: Clarify page roles through titles, H1s, internal linking, and on-page copy to reduce intent overlap.

Issue Description: Priority Houston pages have strong CTAs and trust signals, but internal support should be strengthened so these pages capture more search value.
Recommended Fix: Increase links from navigation, related sections, and supporting pages into high-converting Houston residential and commercial pages.
